content:
📜 1. Transformative Paths – The Evolution of a Character Over Time

📜 Players will have the option to evolve their character into different roles, including unique literary-based antagonists.

✔ How Transformative Paths Work:
• Players can stay on their original archetype path OR choose transformation.
• Transformations unlock at set XP or betrayal thresholds.
• Each transformation path is unique and only one student can claim it.

✔ Types of Transformations:
1️⃣ Villain Evolution (Antagonist Path) – Limited to One Player Per Villain Role
• If a student chooses to become a villain, they select a named literary antagonist and gain special powers—but also significant debuffs.
• Examples:
• Lucifer (The Ultimate Betrayer) → Gains charisma buffs but suffers increased scrutiny & judgment.
• Dr. Jekyll/Mr. Hyde (Dual Identity Conflict) → Gains powerful deception buffs but suffers instability in decision-making.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 482 (chunk 482/555)
